question_html:
Make meaningful sentences with the following words:

Apathy, Incorrigible, Sociopath, Torchbearer, Lucid
solution_html:
Apathy – The apathy of the crowd surprised the speaker.

Incorrigible – The child’s behavior was incorrigible despite many warnings.

Sociopath – He acted like a true sociopath and showed no remorse.

Torchbearer – She became the torchbearer for the new movement, leading others with her vision and passion.

Lucid – Her explanation was clear and lucid.

Marks Distribution:

(0.5×5) = 2.5 marks for making meaningful and correct sentences with the given words.

question_html:
Change the following sentences as directed:

(a) He is one of the best players in the team. (Comparative)

(b) They never appreciate the beauty in ordinary things. (Affirmative)

(c) He made us stay late. (Passive)

(d) None has achieved perfection. (Interrogative)

(e) It was a fantastic performance. (Exclamatory)
solution_html:
(a) He is better than most other players in the team.

(b) They always disregard the beauty in ordinary things.

(c) We were made to stay late by him.

(d) Who has achieved perfection? /Has anyone achieved perfection?

(e) What a fantastic performance it was!

Marks Distribution

(0.5×5) = 2.5 marks for changing the sentences as direction.

question_html: Write a paragraph on ‘The Role of Technology in Modern Education’.
solution_html:
‘The Role of Technology in Modern Education’

Technology has transformed the way education is delivered and received in today’s world. It has made learning more accessible and flexible for students everywhere. Through digital tools like computers, tablets, and the internet, students can access vast resources beyond textbooks. Online classes and educational apps allow learning to happen anytime and anywhere. Technology also helps teachers present lessons in engaging and interactive ways. It supports personalized learning, helping students learn at their own pace. Despite challenges like unequal access, the benefits of technology in education are undeniable. It prepares students for a digital future and bridges gaps in traditional teaching methods. The integration of technology is essential for modern education to be effective and inclusive. With continued advancements, technology will play an even greater role in shaping tomorrow’s learners.

Marks Distribution:

0.5 mark for writing the title “The Role of Technology in Modern Education”.

01 mark for explaining how technology improves accessibility and learning flexibility.

1.5 marks for describing specific tools and benefits like online classes and interactive lessons.

01 mark for mentioning challenges and preparation for the future.

01 mark for emphasizing the importance of technology integration for effective education.

[Instructions:

* Students must write it within one single para. If it becomes more than one para, 50% marks have to be deducted from the obtained marks.

*0.5 mark will be deducted for one or two grammar or spelling mistakes, 01 mark for three or more grammar or spelling mistakes.]
